results.abstract: <jats:title>Abstract</jats:title><jats:p>Male‐biased sex imbalance is a common social concern in many developing countries. results.abstract: <jats:p>Over the last ten years, the gig economy in India has grown at a phenomenal pace, particularly due to the spread of online platforms that match workforce with task-based jobs, even on a temporary basis. Professionals have used such platforms as Swiggy, Ola, and Uber Company to transform the nature of employment by providing flexibility, low barriers to entry, and a set of new dependencies and uncertainties.
